title: How I Cut OCR API Costs by 80% Without Touching the Downstream
excerpt: Google Vision charges per page, not per document. I built a configurable merging pipeline that packs multiple pages into one API call and silently reconstructs per-page responses on the way out. Here's exactly how it works.

title: The Valley That Didn't Care I Was There
excerpt: 87 square kilometres of wildflowers, monsoon rain that soaks through everything, and the most peaceful feeling I've had in years. The Valley of Flowers is the kind of place that recalibrates you.
